name: zero-to-test-ai
description: AI-powered QA pipeline — 7 agents from GitHub issue to executed, self-healing Playwright test suite

scripts.test: playwright test --config playwright.store.config.ts; python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py --unit-results test-results-unit/unit-results.json --output store-qa-report.html && open store-qa-report.html
scripts.test:smoke: playwright test --config playwright.store.config.ts --grep @smoke; python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py --unit-results test-results-unit/unit-results.json --output store-qa-report.html && open store-qa-report.html
scripts.test:store: playwright test --config playwright.store.config.ts; python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py --unit-results test-results-unit/unit-results.json --output store-qa-report.html && open store-qa-report.html
scripts.test:deals: playwright test --config playwright.amazondeal.config.ts; python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py test-results-amazondeal/results.json --output deals-qa-report.html && open deals-qa-report.html
scripts.test:deals:smoke: playwright test --config playwright.amazondeal.config.ts --grep @smoke; python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py test-results-amazondeal/results.json --output deals-qa-report.html && open deals-qa-report.html
scripts.test:chat: playwright test --config playwright.chatconnect.config.ts; python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py test-results-chatconnect/results.json --output chatconnect-qa-report.html && open chatconnect-qa-report.html
scripts.test:chat:smoke: playwright test --config playwright.chatconnect.config.ts --grep @smoke; python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py test-results-chatconnect/results.json --output chatconnect-qa-report.html && open chatconnect-qa-report.html
scripts.report:chat: python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py test-results-chatconnect/results.json --output chatconnect-qa-report.html && open chatconnect-qa-report.html
scripts.report: python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py --unit-results test-results-unit/unit-results.json --output store-qa-report.html && open store-qa-report.html
scripts.report:deals: python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py test-results-amazondeal/results.json --output deals-qa-report.html && open deals-qa-report.html
scripts.report:demoapps: python3 scripts/generate_html_report.py test-results-demoapps/results.json --output demoapps-qa-report.html && open demoapps-qa-report.html
